title: russelia longifolia
intro: Russelia longifolia, also known as the Mexican flame flower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Russelia longifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
